failures.description: The agent misread the ProductCatalogSearch result and concluded there were no matching items even though the tool returned two qualifying products above the requested price threshold.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user's goal was to identify available Mechanical Keyboards with RGB backlight costing more than $233.90. The tool output at index 3 returned two matching items with prices 272.33 and 237.48, both above 233.90. At index 4, the Executor synthesized the opposite answer, claiming no items match. This directly contradicts the relevant tool output and was not resolved later; the Evaluator reinforced the same incorrect interpretation.
